sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ شُورْبَةُ الْعَدَسِ مِنَ الْأَطْبَاقِ الْمَشْهُورَةِ فِي الشِّتَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Čorba od leće se smatra jednim od poznatih jela zimi.
sentences.translationEn: Lentil soup is considered one of the famous dishes in winter.

sentences.arabic: نَطْبُخُ الْعَدَسَ مَعَ الْبَصَلِ وَالْجَزَرِ وَالْكَمُّونِ لِيُعْطِيَ طَعْمًا رَائِعًا.
sentences.translation: Kuhamo leću sa lukom, mrkvom i kuminom kako bi dala predivan ukus.
sentences.translationEn: We cook lentils with onions, carrots, and cumin to give a wonderful taste.

sentences.arabic: نَضَعُ الْقَلِيلَ مِنَ الْمِلْحِ وَعَصِيرِ اللَّيْمُونِ قَبْلَ التَّقْدِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Stavljamo malo soli i limunovog soka prije posluživanja.
sentences.translationEn: We put a little salt and lemon juice before serving.
